productDisplayName: Skechers Men Prospeed Black Sports Shoes
description: Trendy and functional, these Prospeed shoes from skechers add an extra bounce to your step while running. With a great mesh-synthetic combination, these shoes are designed forefficient and explosive power. Look super stylish in these comfortable shoes all day long. .Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for durability and style Synthetic overlays in EXO-SKIN seamless tech design for reinforcement, less friction and added style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Sofly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for improved ventilation Brand tab on tongue and brand logo embedded on the side Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort Kinetic return system combines the strength and flexibility of the Dupont Hytrel material with the efficiency of an elliptical shape to deflect and convert impact forces and elastic energy into forward motion Outsole Outsole with durable high-abrasion rubber outsole with rubber treads maximise traction while enhancing cushioning Midfoot strike diffuses impact energy evenly across the foot and transforms it into reusable energy Flex grooves for better flexibility of the feet Mutli-directional ugs, wave patterned grooves gives extra traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
